profile.name: Sergio Afanou
profile.title: Software Engineer & Indie Maker
profile.summary: Full-stack software engineer and solopreneur building SaaS products, automation tools, and enterprise solutions. Specializes in Python, JavaScript, Google Apps Script, Jekyll, and cloud-native architectures.

entries.title: InboxPulse — 8-Component Email Intelligence System
entries.summary: Built an 8-component email intelligence system integrating two Gmail addons via a shared Google Sheets bus.
entries.description: Designed and shipped G1 SORTER (rule-based routing), G2 HARVEST (metadata extraction), G3 PULSE (analytics), G4 SENTRY (threshold alerts), G5 CONDUIT (n8n bridge), G6 GUARDIAN (follow-up enforcement), G7 ACTION HUB (sidebar actions), and G8 WATCHER (compliance monitor).
achievements: 192 unit tests across 8 components — all passing
Zero paid services: full system runs on free-tier Google Workspace + self-hosted n8n
Single 1h shared trigger instead of 8 separate triggers (stays under 20-trigger cap)
learnings: Apps Script has no module system — test pure functions by mirroring them in Node.js
Google Sheets as a message bus is surprisingly capable for low-volume workflows

entries.title: Smart CV — Jekyll Theme + Automation Pipeline
entries.summary: Built an end-to-end CV automation pipeline: vault field schema → JSON export → Jekyll collection → React PDF generator.
entries.description: Designed CV-Entry:: vault field spec, wrote cv_entry_review.py (scans 100%-complete sub-projects), cv_linkedin_generator.py (3 LinkedIn formats per entry), cv_jekyll_publisher.py (generates _cv/*.md for Jekyll blog), and this Vite+React PDF generator.
achievements: CV data flows from Obsidian sub-projects to Jekyll website to PDF in one vault shepherd run
LinkedIn post drafts auto-generated alongside each CV entry
